title: Origins: Dragons Galore
description: Some unique dragon-related origins and classes
body:
Origins: Dragons Galore is an origins addon featuring 3 origins and 2 classes.

The origins are the following:
- fire dragon: a pvp-oriented dragon origin featuring a powerful fireball ability, immunity to fire, water vulnerability and natural fire aspect when on fire.
- Sea Dragon: An aquatic dragon origin which gains buffs underwater and debuffs on dry land. Its primary ability allows the player to fish 3 raw salmon every 5 seconds.
- Wind Dragon: A dragon origin focused on longer flights, but more fragile and slower on water.

The classes cannot be chosen when the player has an origin of the above. They are the following:

- DragonKeeper: strengthens dragons around them and can mount them.
- Dragon Slayer: disables a player's wings on hit (if it's one of the origins above or elytrian) and deals more damage to them (only if its origin is one of the dragon origins from this mod).

NOTABLE MECHANIC: Takeoff. Players using these origins can only boost a limited ammount of times between liftoff and landing (1 for fire and sea dragons and 3 for wind dragon).

More dragons are coming in the following updates.
